creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
I had some contact with the rexx-imc author and he states that most
patches in the previous distribution can be removed in his new version.
BTW, this was also tested with egcs, so it should give no problems in 
-current

How-To-Repeat: While I did a simple update of the previous port, I was to lazy 
completely change the build procedure so there will be no man pages in
this update but it should work better than the previous one.
